title: Infusion Table
description: Rip enchantments from items into books.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AOT5vSdvkxA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 📖 About
Makes disenchanting possible in vanilla minecraft.

Now you will be able to convert _useless items_ with **good enchantments** into enchanted books.

## ‍🍳 Recipe
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00f8c00cc4b3894eef99285e132e1289eac104b0.png)

PS: If you play on modded minecraft, you can find better version of this mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/infusion-table).
